task_updates.executor_notes: Added `sql/20260514000000_create_worker_capacity_intents.sql` with `worker_capacity_intents`, `worker_capacity_route_backoffs` using non-null `route_key` default `__pool_floor__` plus `UNIQUE (pool, route_key)`, and TTL-capable `orchestrator_leases`. Registered the migration through shared `scripts/sql_migrations.py`; updated `scripts/apply_sql_migrations.py` and `scripts/show_migrations.py` to use the explicit registry and to execute full SQL files without semicolon splitting. Added capacity schema verification SQL that checks all three schema surfaces, route backoff non-null sentinel/default/uniqueness, and confirms `system_logs.valid_source_type` still allows only existing source families. Verified with `python -m pytest tests/scripts -q`, `python -m py_compile scripts/apply_sql_migrations.py scripts/show_migrations.py scripts/sql_migrations.py`, `python scripts/apply_sql_migrations.py --help`, and `python scripts/show_migrations.py` greps for the new migration and verification block. Full suite was run with `python -m pytest --tb=no -q --no-header`; it failed only at pre-existing-looking `tests/test_module_import_coverage.py::test_runpod_cutover_modules_import_at_runtime` because `scripts.spot_instance_lifetime_test` is missing, unrelated to T1. Live DB application was not run because production/staging migration execution is after_execute user action U1.
commands_run: python scripts/show_migrations.py >/tmp/show_migrations_with_verify.out && rg -n 'CAPACITY SCHEMA VERIFICATION|valid_source_type|UNIQUE \\(pool, route_key\\)|__pool_floor__' /tmp/show_migrations_with_verify.out

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The migration creates `worker_capacity_intents`, route-scoped `worker_capacity_route_backoffs`, and TTL-capable `orchestrator_leases`; route backoffs enforce non-null `route_key` with `__pool_floor__` default plus `UNIQUE (pool, route_key)`. The migration does not alter `system_logs`; the verification block checks `valid_source_type` still contains existing source types and no capacity-specific source type. Schema verification is exposed through `scripts/apply_sql_migrations.py` and printed by `scripts/show_migrations.py`.
